scenario_description: The user says to fill in the profit column but doesn't specify the formula. The agent asks, then fills the Gross profit column with revenue minus expenses.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me fill in the profit column
Fill the Gross profit column with a formula (revenue minus all expenses) for every row, then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; df = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/IncomeStatement2.xlsx'); cols = [c for c in df.columns if 'gross' in str(c).lower() or 'profit' in str(c).lower()]; ok = len(cols) > 0 and df[cols[0]].dropna().shape[0] > 0; print('PASSED' if ok else 'FAILED')"
